title: Admin impedido de excluir a própria conta

unit_tests.self_delete_test: Não deve permitir auto-exclusão (userId === requesterId) → CannotDeleteSelfError — PASSED

business_flow_tests.self_delete_test: Deve retornar 403 ao tentar excluir a si mesmo → HTTP 403 com .message — PASSED

RF-007.description: Auto-exclusão rejeitada com erro de negócio específico

RF-019.description: Frontend oculta botão de exclusão para o próprio admin
RF-019.evidence: canDelete = !isProtectedAccount(user, currentUserId) where isProtectedAccount returns true when currentUserId === user.id

notes: requesterId from JWT confirmed via req.user.sub.id in DeleteUserController.callback()
Frontend canDelete hides self via isProtectedAccount() checking currentUserId === user.id from useAuthStore
isProtectedAccount also blocks super admin (admin@admin.com) from deletion
CannotDeleteSelfError mapped to HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN in DeleteUserController.mapResponseError()
Unit test: guard fires BEFORE any DB lookup — early return before userRepository.userOfId()
Task 2 skipped: backend unit test coverage already exists, no new src tests added
